summary: Implements a multi-page food marketing site using TanStack Router with Home/Menu/About/Contact pages, a warm (non-blue/purple) theme, and a contact form UI that calls a Motoko backend. However, the required generated static image files are not shown as added, and the backend persistence logic appears incorrect/incomplete based on the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and include static image assets under frontend/public/assets/generated (hero-food.dim_1600x900.png and logo-mark.dim_512x512.png) and reference them in the UI.
missing_requirements.reason: The UI references the generated image paths, but the diff does not show any files added under frontend/public/assets/generated, so the required static assets themselves are not implemented/committed in the provided changes.

missing_requirements.requirement: Persist contact form submissions in the Motoko backend (in canister memory) and provide success/error handling.
missing_requirements.reason: While a submit method exists, the backend storage implementation appears non-functional: submissions is declared as an immutable let List.empty, and the code calls submissions.add(...) without reassigning (and List.add is not shown as producing a stored result). This does not clearly implement actual persistence in memory based on the provided snippet.
evidence: backend/main.mo (let submissions = List.empty...; submissions.add((name, email, message));)

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication provider/wiring added (InternetIdentityProvider, useInternetIdentity, identity-aware actor creation).
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest states Internet Identity is supported but not required for this marketing site; adding full II context/hooks is beyond the requested marketing-site requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend/admin-style retrieval of all contact submissions and corresponding React Query hook.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only asks to submit and persist contact form submissions and show success/error to the user; it does not request an endpoint/UI hook to list or retrieve all submissions.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer social media links/icons (Instagram/Facebook) included in layout.
hallucinated_features.reason: Social links are not mentioned in the BuildRequest requirements or acceptance criteria.
